label: Notices
title: Company notices
summary: Company updates and public notices will appear here.

items.title: Second Furnace Operations Commenced.
items.summary:
Aja Alloys Pvt. Ltd. is pleased to announce the commencement of operations for its second furnace at Norbugang Industrial Park, Samtse.

The start of the second furnace marks an important milestone in strengthening our production capacity, improving operational continuity, and supporting the company’s long-term growth plans.

We extend our appreciation to our employees, technical teams, partners, and stakeholders for their continued support in achieving this milestone.

For further information, please contact sales@aja.bt.

items.title: BIS India Plant and Product Verification Visit
items.summary:
Aja Alloys Pvt. Ltd. welcomed a delegation from the Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS), India, on April 9, 2026, for verification of the company’s product and plant facilities at Norbugang Industrial Park, Samtse.

The visit included an assessment of product quality, production processes, and plant readiness in line with applicable standards and verification requirements. The BIS team also shared information on their role in supporting standardisation, quality assurance, and product conformity.

The visit was completed successfully, and Aja Alloys Pvt. Ltd. appreciates the guidance and cooperation extended by BIS India during the verification process.

For further information, please contact sales@aja.bt.
